Architectural Draftsman & BIM Modeler

Toolset

What runs the drawings

Every project moves through the same toolchain — from raw drafting to a coordinated model to a rendered image a client can actually picture.

AutoCAD
2D construction documentation — plans, elevations, sections, door/window/roof schedules.
Revit Architecture
Coordinated BIM modeling with linked structural, electrical and plumbing disciplines.
SketchUp
Fast concept and massing models used as the base for interior and exterior renders.
Civil 3D
Site grading, civil layout, and earthwork documentation.
3ds Max + V–Ray
Photoreal rendering — lighting, materials, and camera work for client-facing visuals.
Scan–to–BIM
Point-cloud and PDF survey data rebuilt as accurate as-built Revit models.
Sheet Set — Detailing

Construction documentation

Full detail sets built to code — plans, elevations, sections, and RC schedules with complete rebar, beam, and services callouts.

Case Study — As–Built Survey

Point cloud to BIM

An existing hotel building was surveyed and rebuilt as a coordinated Revit model — basement through second floor — using scanned point-cloud data and reference PDFs to produce accurate as–built documentation.

The result is a fully navigable 3D model with matching sheet-set drawings, ready for renovation planning.

4
Floor levels modeled
Revit
+ AutoCAD
As–built
Survey accuracy

Workflow

From site to sheet to render

The same four moves carry every project, whether it starts from a client brief, a hand sketch, or a laser scan.

01

Survey & brief

Site data, point–cloud scans, or client references gathered and cross–checked.

02

2D drafting

AutoCAD plans, elevations, sections, and schedules to the National Structural Code.

03

BIM modeling

Coordinated 3D model built in Revit or SketchUp, checked against the drawing set.

04

Visualization

Materials, lighting, and camera work finished into a photoreal render in V–Ray.

Have a set of drawings that needs finishing?

Open to drafting, BIM modeling, and visualization work — residential, hospitality, and small commercial projects.
